channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DBS, Southeast Asia’s largest bank, partners with VC giant Granite Asia to counter the region’s lack of capital
item.description: The partnership launches with a new $110 million fund, exclusively for DBS's wealth clients, that targets IPO-stage AI and tech startups in the region...

item.title: Now You Can Experience Wispr Flow By Dictating To Your Android Device
item.description: Today, Wispr has announced the launch of Flow for Android. Finally, the company says, there is a version it believes the world’s 4 billion Android use...

item.title: Old-Fashioned Therapy Gets Transformed Into AI Mental Health Micro-Bursts Anytime Anywhere
item.description: At scale AI usage for mental health is on a snacking basis, which I coin as AI-based therapy micro-bursts. Here's what it is all about. An AI Insider ...

item.title: How Samsung’s Galaxy S26 Ultra Will Change Smartphones Forever
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy Unpacked can shift the market from "spec wars" to Agentic AI and on-device privacy. This is how the Galaxy S26 Ultra redefines the fu...

item.title: CEO, AI Is Your Job
item.description: 72 percent of CEO surveyed believe they are the primary decision-maker on AI in their company. Many are betting on deploying the tech to ensure their ...

item.title: U.S. asks citizens in Mexico to shelter after cartel leader killed
item.description: The security alert covers the states of Jalisco, Tamaulipas, Michoacán, Guerrero and Nuevo León.

item.title: Delta expects to halt flights at NYC, Boston airports for storm
item.description: More than 8,500 flights have been canceled through Tuesday, according to tracking site FlightAware.

item.title: CEOs who despised Trump’s tariffs are still silent after Supreme Court ruling: ‘There’s no upside in speaking up’
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Northern Lights Alert Monday: 11 States Now In Line After Hole In Sun
item.description: NOAA is forecasting a G1-class geomagnetic storm on Monday, Feb. 23, through Tuesday, Feb. 24, with the aurora borealis possible from northern U.S. st...

item.title: Trump boasts that the U.S. has ‘the greatest economy actually ever.’ Human nature suggests that’s exactly the wrong message to send to voters
item.description: History suggests that voters' anxiety can outweigh good economic numbers at the polls. Just ask George Bush and Bill Clinton.

item.title: Novo Nordisk says new weight-loss drug not as potent as Eli Lilly's; stock sinks
Tariff costs and refunds take the spotlight as retailers set to report earnings
Gold sheds its safe-haven status. Is it just another momentum play now?
U.S. stock futures flat as investors await clarity on Trump’s tariff plans
Could these 6 non-AI chip stocks be the next leg of the AI boom?
US economy grew slower than expected in fourth quarter
item.description: The U.S. economy grew at a rate of 1.4% in the fourth quarter of 2025, according to an estimate released on Friday by the Bureau of Economic Analysis.

item.title: How should businesses approach tariff refunds?
item.description: Trade experts note that businesses seeking tariff refunds may need to appeal to CBP or the Court of International Trade to get their money back after ...

item.title: Deadliest jobs in America revealed
item.description: The United States Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that there were more than 5,000 deadly work injuries recorded in the nation in 2024.

item.title: Will refunds be issued after Supreme Court ruling on Trump tariffs?
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump's IEEPA tariffs, which could open the door to billions of dollars in tariff refunds, though the r...

item.title: Fed's favored inflation gauge showed consumer price growth remained elevated in December
item.description: The Commerce Department released the PCE inflation report on Friday, which showed the Fed's favored inflation gauge remained elevated as consumers dea...

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
